About Us

Simplifying Insurance, Securing Lives

At ApnaSecure, we connect you with the best insurance plans from leading providers. Our mission is to make insurance simple, accessible, and stress-free for every individual and family. With our expertise and technology, securing your future has never been easier.

Learn More

WHY CHOOSE APNASECURE

Your Trusted Insurance Partner

With ApnaSecure, you get more than just insurance you get peace of mind.

Zero Investment Start your insurance journey without any upfront costs or hidden fees.
Wide Range of Policies Access a variety of insurance products from top providers, tailored to your clients' needs.
Unlimited Earning Potential Maximise your income with our commission-based opportunities.
Expert Support Our dedicated team ensures you have the guidance needed to make confident decisions.
Explore Benefits

Tailored Protection for Every Need

Comprehensive Insurance Options

Two Wheeler Insurance

Affordable coverage to keep your two-wheeler secure on every ride.

Car Insurance

Flexible and reliable plans to protect your car on every journey.

Commercial Vehicle

Comprehensive policies to safeguard your business and assets.

Health Insurance

Tailored health plans designed to keep you and your family secure.

Home Insurance

Robust coverage to protect your home from unforeseen risks.

Life Insurance

Financial security and peace of mind for you and your loved ones.

Travel Insurance

Complete protection for worry-free travel across the globe.

Accidental Insurance

Reliable plans to cover unexpected injuries or accidents.

Corporate Insurance

Custom solutions to protect your employees and operations.

POLICIES SOLD

Join the ApnaSecure Network

Become a POSP Agent and Grow Your Income

Earn while helping others secure their future.

  • Unlimited Earnings: Earn attractive commissions for every policy sold.
  • Work Flexibly: Choose your schedule and work from anywhere.
  • Comprehensive Training: Learn everything you need to sell insurance.
  • Partner with Top Providers: Offer plans from the best insurance companies.
Become a POSP Agent

TESTIMONIALS

happy partners and cutomers

Sakshi Sharma

Selling insurance policies, online with (Apnasecure) ProSales financial services private limited, is such a smooth experience. I start and finish work as per my convenience. The complete process saves so much time.

Rohit kumar

Such a wide range of insurance products, I compare the quotes and choose the best fit for my customers. My customers are happy to get quick policies and I am happy to get timely payments.
